<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // No sleep() or waitForTimeout needed!</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'delayed-1s'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toBeVisible</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'delayed-1s'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toHaveText</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Appeared after 1 second!'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">});</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// Exercise 2: Wait for Slow Element (3s)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">test</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 2: wait for 3-second delayed element'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#F97583">async</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> ({ </span><span style="color:#FFAB70">page</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> }) </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">goto</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#79B8FF">PLAYGROUND</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'btn-delay-3s'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // 3 seconds is within the default 5s timeout, so this works too.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'delayed-3s'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toBeVisible</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'delayed-3s'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toHaveText</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Appeared after 3 seconds!'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">});</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// Exercise 2b: Wait for Very Slow Element (7s) - Custom Timeout</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">test</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 2b: wait for 7-second delayed element with custom timeout'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#F97583">async</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> ({ </span><span style="color:#FFAB70">page</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> }) </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">goto</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#79B8FF">PLAYGROUND</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'btn-delay-7s'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // 7 seconds exceeds the default 5s timeout. We must increase it.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // The { timeout } option tells Playwright how long to retry.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'delayed-7s'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toBeVisible</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">({ timeout: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">10000</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> });</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'delayed-7s'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toHaveText</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Appeared after 7 seconds!'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">});</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// Exercise 3: Loading State Transition</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">test</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 3: loading spinner then data'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#F97583">async</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> ({ </span><span style="color:#FFAB70">page</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> }) </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">goto</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#79B8FF">PLAYGROUND</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Verify initial state.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'initial-message'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toBeVisible</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Click the fetch button.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'btn-fetch-data'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Verify the loading spinner appears.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // The spinner shows immediately after clicking.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'loading-spinner'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toBeVisible</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Now wait for the data to load (replaces the spinner after 2s).</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // We don't need to wait for the spinner to disappear first —</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // just assert the final state and Playwright handles the timing.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'applicant-data'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toBeVisible</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'loaded-name'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toHaveText</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Priya Sharma'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'loaded-email'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toHaveText</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'priya@example.com'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'loaded-status'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toHaveText</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Verified'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">});</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// Exercise 4: Polling / Auto-Refresh</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">test</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 4: wait for polling to complete'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#F97583">async</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> ({ </span><span style="color:#FFAB70">page</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> }) </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">goto</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#79B8FF">PLAYGROUND</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Click to start the verification polling process.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'btn-start-polling'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // The status updates every 2 seconds through 5 steps.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Total time: ~10 seconds. We need a longer timeout.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'polling-step'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toHaveText</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'5'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, { timeout: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">15000</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> });</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'polling-status'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toHaveText</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Complete'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">});</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// Exercise 5: Debounced Search</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">test</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 5: debounced search with 300ms delay'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#F97583">async</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> ({ </span><span style="color:#FFAB70">page</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> }) </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">goto</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#79B8FF">PLAYGROUND</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Type into the debounced search box.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'input-debounce-search'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">fill</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Priya'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // After typing, a "Searching..." indicator shows for 300ms.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Then the actual results appear.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // We just wait for the final state — the search results.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'search-result'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">first</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">()).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toBeVisible</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'search-result'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">first</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">()).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toContainText</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Priya Sharma'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">});</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// Exercise 6: Progress Bar</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">test</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 6: wait for progress bar to complete'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#F97583">async</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> ({ </span><span style="color:#FFAB70">page</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> }) </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">goto</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#79B8FF">PLAYGROUND</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'btn-start-upload'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // The progress bar fills incrementally. We wait for the status text</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // to indicate completion rather than checking the exact percentage.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'upload-status'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toHaveText</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Processing complete!'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, { timeout: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">10000</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> });</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'upload-percent'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toHaveText</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'100%'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">});</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// Exercise 7: Toast Notification Lifecycle</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">test</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 7: toast appears and auto-dismisses'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#F97583">async</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> ({ </span><span style="color:#FFAB70">page</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> }) </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">goto</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#79B8FF">PLAYGROUND</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Click to show a success toast.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'btn-toast-success'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Verify the toast appears immediately.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  const</span><span style="color:#79B8FF"> toast</span><span style="color:#F97583"> =</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'toast-1'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(toast).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toBeVisible</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(toast).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toContainText</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Application approved successfully!'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // The toast auto-dismisses after 3 seconds + 0.5s fade animation.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // We wait for it to be removed from the DOM.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // toBeHidden waits for the element to become hidden or detached.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(toast).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toBeHidden</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">({ timeout: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">5000</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> });</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">});</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// Exercise 8: Skeleton to Content</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">// --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">test</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 8: skeleton loading then real content'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#F97583">async</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> ({ </span><span style="color:#FFAB70">page</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> }) </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">goto</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#79B8FF">PLAYGROUND</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'btn-load-profile'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Verify skeleton appears.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'skeleton-loader'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toBeVisible</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Wait for real profile data (replaces skeleton after 2.5s).</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'profile-data'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toBeVisible</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'profile-name'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toHaveText</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Amit Patel'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">  await</span><span style="color:#B392F0"> expect</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(page.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">getByTestId</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'profile-level'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">toHaveText</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Level 3 - Enhanced'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">});</span></span>
<span class="line"></span></code></pre>a9:T67bc,<pre class="shiki github-dark" style="background-color:#24292e;color:#e1e4e8" tabindex="0"><code><span class="line"><span style="color:#F97583">const</span><span style="color:#79B8FF"> PLAYGROUND</span><span style="color:#F97583"> =</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF"> '/phase-00-foundations/03-waits-and-timing/playground/'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">;</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">describe</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Kata 03: Waits and Timing'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, () </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">  beforeEach</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(() </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">visit</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#79B8FF">PLAYGROUND</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">  });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Exercise 1: Wait for Delayed Element (1s)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">  it</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 1: wait for 1-second delayed element'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, () </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="btn-delay-1s"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Cypress automatically retries .should() assertions for up to 4s (default).</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Since the element appears after 1s, this works within the default timeout.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // No cy.wait(1000) needed!</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="delayed-1s"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'be.visible'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">and</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'have.text'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Appeared after 1 second!'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">  });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Exercise 2: Wait for Slow Element (3s)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">  it</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 2: wait for 3-second delayed element'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, () </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="btn-delay-3s"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // 3s is within the default 4s timeout, so this works.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="delayed-3s"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'be.visible'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">and</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'have.text'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Appeared after 3 seconds!'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">  });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Exercise 2b: Wait for Very Slow Element (7s) - Custom Timeout</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">  it</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 2b: wait for 7-second delayed element with custom timeout'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, () </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="btn-delay-7s"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // 7s exceeds the default 4s timeout. Pass { timeout } to cy.get</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // to increase the retry window for this specific command.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="delayed-7s"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, { timeout: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">10000</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> })</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'be.visible'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">and</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'have.text'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Appeared after 7 seconds!'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">  });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Exercise 3: Loading State Transition</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">  it</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 3: loading spinner then data'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, () </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Verify initial state.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="initial-message"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'be.visible'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Click the fetch button.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="btn-fetch-data"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Verify the loading spinner appears.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="loading-spinner"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'be.visible'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Wait for the data to load (replaces spinner after 2s).</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Cypress retries .should until the element appears.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="applicant-data"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, { timeout: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">5000</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> })</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'be.visible'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="loaded-name"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'have.text'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Priya Sharma'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="loaded-email"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'have.text'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'priya@example.com'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="loaded-status"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'have.text'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Verified'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">  });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Exercise 4: Polling / Auto-Refresh</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">  it</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 4: wait for polling to complete'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, () </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="btn-start-polling"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // The polling takes ~10 seconds (5 steps x 2s each).</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // We need a longer timeout to wait for the final state.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="polling-step"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, { timeout: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">15000</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> })</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'have.text'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'5'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="polling-status"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'have.text'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Complete'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">  });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Exercise 5: Debounced Search</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">  it</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 5: debounced search with 300ms delay'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, () </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Type into the debounced search box.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="input-debounce-search"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">type</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Priya'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // After typing, a "Searching..." indicator shows for 300ms,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // then the actual results appear.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // We just assert the final state — Cypress retries until results show.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="search-result"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'have.length.gte'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">1</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">first</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">()</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'contain.text'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Priya Sharma'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">  });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Exercise 6: Progress Bar</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">  it</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 6: wait for progress bar to complete'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, () </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="btn-start-upload"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Wait for the status text to indicate completion.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="upload-status"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, { timeout: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">10000</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> })</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'have.text'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Processing complete!'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="upload-percent"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'have.text'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'100%'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">  });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Exercise 7: Toast Notification Lifecycle</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">  it</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 7: toast appears and auto-dismisses'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, () </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="btn-toast-success"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Verify the toast appears.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="toast-1"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'be.visible'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">and</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'contain.text'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Application approved successfully!'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // The toast auto-dismisses after 3s + 0.5s fade.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // 'not.exist' waits for the element to be removed from the DOM entirely.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="toast-1"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, { timeout: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">5000</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> })</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'not.exist'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">  });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // Exercise 8: Skeleton to Content</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">  // --------------------------------------------------------------------------</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#B392F0">  it</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'exercise 8: skeleton loading then real content'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, () </span><span style="color:#F97583">=></span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="btn-load-profile"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">click</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">();</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Verify skeleton appears.</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="skeleton-loader"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'be.visible'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6A737D">    // Wait for real profile data (replaces skeleton after 2.5s).</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="profile-data"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, { timeout: </span><span style="color:#79B8FF">5000</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8"> })</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">      .</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'be.visible'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="profile-name"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'have.text'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Amit Patel'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">    cy.</span><span style="color:#B392F0">get</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'[data-testid="profile-level"]'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">).</span><span style="color:#B392F0">should</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'have.text'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">, </span><span style="color:#9ECBFF">'Level 3 - Enhanced'</span><span style="color:#E1E4E8">);</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">  });</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#E1E4E8">});</span></span>
